Uses of Interface
utilities.ListADT

  • Packages that use ListADT 
    Package Description
    implementations
    Contains concrete implementations of the Dictionary ADT.
    utilities
    Contains interfaces and utility classes used by the Dictionary ADT.

    • Uses of ListADT in implementations

      Classes in implementations that implement ListADT 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  MyArrayList<E>
      MyArrayList is an array-based implementation of the ListADT interface.
      class  MyDLL<E>
      MyDLL is a doubly linked list implementation of the ListADT interface.
      Methods in implementations with parameters of type ListADT 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean MyDLL.addAll(ListADT<? extends E> toAdd)
      Appends all elements in the specified ListADT to the end of this list, in the order returned by the specified list's iterator.
      boolean MyArrayList.addAll(ListADT<? extends E> toAdd)
      Appends all elements in the specified ListADT to the end of this list, in the order returned by the specified list's iterator.

    • Uses of ListADT in utilities

      Methods in utilities with parameters of type ListADT 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean ListADT.addAll(ListADT<? extends E> toAdd)
      Appends all of the elements in the specified java.utilCollection to the end of this list, in the order that they are returned by the specified collection's Iterator.
